headline: Home Depot (HD) Launches 2026 Halloween Collection With Upgraded Skelly Animatronics
summary: Home Depot launched its 2026 Halloween collection, featuring upgraded technology in its popular animatronic décor, including the viral SKELLY skeleton. The new lineup expands interactive features and broadens the range of seasonal products aimed at Halloween shoppers. The collection is positioned to support customer engagement and traffic around a key retail holiday period. Home Depot (NYSE:HD), currently trading at $331.45, is leaning into seasonal merchandise with this updated Halloween...

headline: Weak housing market hurts big and bulky last-mile delivery
summary: Last-mile delivery of big items is slowing down as fewer houses change hands in a difficult real estate market. Carriers are trying to beat competitors in a slowing market with top-notch service and technology, but also need more scale to deal with vertically integrated retailers. The post Weak housing market hurts big and bulky last-mile delivery appeared first on FreightWaves.
